description: Recurring patterns of advance and retreat, the breathing of the ocean that teaches patience with natural timing. It represents the wisdom of knowing when to push forward and when to pull back, following cosmic rather than mechanical rhythms.
rationale: The word 'phiu' begins with the breath-like fricative 'phi', evoking the ocean's breathing. The vowel hiatus 'i-u' creates a pulling motion, from the high, forward 'i' to the deep, back 'u', sonically mimicking the tide's retreat. This simple FV.V structure captures the elemental rhythm of tidal movement.
